title: dyschoriste humistrata
intro: Dyschoriste humistrata, also known as the forest dyschoriste, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Dyschoriste humistrata include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments.
